name: Absorb Shield
description: Absorb Shields are Vladof-made defensive shields that can sometimes catch incoming bullets or rockets. When an absorption triggers, the hit is cancelled and you gain ammo of the same type. Higher-quality versions usually have a better absorb rate, making them handy against gun-heavy foes and for stretching your ammunition in long fights.
notes: Absorption only applies to certain projectile attacks, not all damage sources. It shines in exposed firefights with limited cover and against enemies relying on standard firearms.

special.description: Chance to absorb incoming projectiles, prevent their damage, and add the corresponding ammo to your reserves.
